recent.author: Nir Sebastian Shmuely
recent.snippet: Hello Chris! I am Nir, Pulse's owner — wanted to get some more context on your feedback on Pulse. Could you share a bit more on where specifically the experience feels too text-heavy?

recent.author: Nir Sebastian Shmuely
recent.snippet: is this live already? where can I see it? might want to plug it in to Pulse

recent.author: Sunny Lin
recent.snippet: Morning Nir! I put time on your calendar because I got an ask from Sneha to put a capacity management page in Pulse. I will share more details but she wants to model it after the Lovable app I shared from Melissa Cooper.

recent.author: Paige Spell
recent.snippet: @Sean Muse is it possible to get the accounts for Gravin running today so I can cross check with pulse output?

recent.author: Alex Rosenbower
recent.snippet: @Nir Shmuely can we swap the pulse bottom line with a Canary health summary for consistency?

recent.author: Sunny Lin
recent.snippet: I'd love to have a Jammy where you lead the group on Lovable. How you built pulse with it: set it up, maintaining it and incorporating the feedback loop.

recent.author: Nir Sebastian Shmuely
recent.snippet: Hey Emily! Nice to meet you! I am Nir, Pulse's owner. To your question on Encore I took a deeper look into the sub of this account and wasn't able to see the analytics usage you are referring to.

recent.author: Nir Sebastian Shmuely
recent.snippet: I'd love to build an agent in Pulse using Gemini Enterprise that can look across the available signals — especially call data and Pendo usage — identify the likely risk theme automatically, and map it to the right playbook for the CE.

recent.author: Alli Bordogna
recent.snippet: Hi team, I'm looking at HubSpot. They are a Predict only customer so aren't showing any engagement and therefore high risk. Is there something else we can pull into Pulse to look at usage/health?

recent.author: Sunny Lin
recent.snippet: We should look into Embedding Omni into Pulse! kind of like this

recent.author: Paige Spell
recent.snippet: I'll go through some vetting today with the Canary output in Pulse to the context the risk slack bot (also using canary) is giving to be sure signals align!

recent.author: Nir Sebastian Shmuely
recent.snippet: 🐤 Canary is now in live Pulse 💓! Big thanks to @zac — Canary is officially wired into Pulse, making it easier than ever to tap into customer intelligence without leaving their workflow.

recent.author: Nir Sebastian Shmuely
recent.snippet: Canary now works in Pulse!! added it in 3 diff places with 3 diff prompts. will see how users use this now!

recent.author: Nir Sebastian Shmuely
recent.snippet: Hey team! checking in to see if you were able audit some of the Data shown in Pulse. would love your sign on the platform so we can roll it out with confidence and if any gaps are surfaced to fix them promptly.

recent.snippet: @Carolynn how would you like to see these in Pulse?

recent.author: Nir Sebastian Shmuely
recent.snippet: Hey @zac good morning! we are trying to get Canary into Pulse - how can we connect it? I would want to use what you have built instead of rebuilding the agent myself

recent.author: Nir Sebastian Shmuely

recent.author: John Walenty
recent.snippet: Hi All, can anyone help me understand why there is a difference between what my accounts are in SFDC and what I am seeing in Pulse? Just timing?

recent.author: Sean Muse
recent.snippet: no worries looking forward to connecting soon! Pulse looks great I've explored it

recent.author: Alex Rosenbower
recent.snippet: The CE leaders are getting ready to push their teams into Pulse as part of their enablement training today at 12pm est. I set the expectations that we're still collecting feedback and making changes through 5/1.

recent.author: Adi Thatai
recent.snippet: Hey team! Nina and I spent some time in Pulse and have a couple thoughts. It seems like the dashboard consistently prioritizes action on the lowest health accounts in all sections. I think we should trim some of the repetition on at-risk accounts while adding more guided actions for already healthy accounts.

recent.author: Alex Rosenbower
recent.snippet: hey Alli! We're going to be rolling off the pulse score in favor of leveraging Pendo Predict + a new summarization of information through a tool called Canary in the coming weeks.
